HomeDestinationsPeshok
West Bengal

Peshok

The Tea Garden Wonderland

Emerald tea bushes stretching to the horizon, terracotta soil paths weaving through plantations.

4.3
(64 reviews)
Darjeeling, West Bengal
mountainsnatureculturetrekking
21°C
Partly Cloudy
Explore

About Peshok

Peshok is a beautiful area known for its tea gardens, the confluence of the Teesta and Rangeet rivers, and stunning valley views.

A major tea-producing area with colonial-era plantations and stunning river confluence views.

mountainsnatureculturetrekkingphotography

Quick Facts

Altitude
1,200 m
Weather
Pleasant throughout the year
Best Time
October to May
Rating
4.3 (64 reviews)
Ideal For
Solo, Couples, Families, Seniors
